message:
refactor: extract errNoClusterAccess helper, dedup 60+ handler guards (#9826)

11 handler files had 60+ copy-pasted "no cluster access" error
responses with inconsistent messages ("No cluster access",
"Kubernetes client not available", "No cluster access available").

Extract a single errNoClusterAccess(c) helper in demo_data.go and
replace all fiber.Map-based variants. Unifies the error message to
"No cluster access" across all endpoints.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
